testcase.name: test_register_creates_unverified_user
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter16_email_auth.py:52: in test_register_creates_unverified_user assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","phone"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"cuba.iter16@example.com","password":"veryStrongPass123","name":"Iter16 Test User"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_email_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter16_email_auth.py:70: in test_register_duplicate_email_rejected assert r.status_code == 409 E assert 422 == 409 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_email_logs_user_in
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter16_email_auth.py:89: in test_verify_email_logs_user_in v = _verify(user["verification_token"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_verify_token_single_use
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter16_email_auth.py:104: in test_verify_token_single_use token = user["verification_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_login_blocked_until_verified
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter16_email_auth.py:117: in test_login_blocked_until_verified assert r.status_code == 403, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":{"code":"USER_NOT_FOUND","message":"No existe una cuenta con este email. Crea una cuenta para acceder a la plataforma."}} E assert 404 == 403 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_alert_when_real_rate_makes_loss
testcase.failure: tests/test_marketplace_profit_and_margin.py:301: in test_alert_when_real_rate_makes_loss assert body["amount_to"] == pytest.approx(36100.0) E assert 38000.0 == 36100.0 ± 0.0361 E E comparison failed E Obtained: 38000.0 E Expected: 36100.0 ± 0.0361
